_comment: MacroTilt Trading Opportunities screener — calibrated config. The live engine (run_screener.py) reads this file. Phase 2 retail-optimized 2026-05-20 (insider age-decay folded in 2026-05-20). 2026-05-21: dark-pool and options scoring layers activated — score ceiling raised 5 -> 10. Insider point values, trend, lookback window and launch threshold are backtest-calibrated (regenerated by backtest_engine.py). Dark-pool and options point values are from the locked spec and are NOT yet backtested — see their _note fields. Authoritative dark-pool/options thresholds live in darkpool_scoring.py and options_scoring.py; the blocks here document them.
_shadow_layers_note: Empty since 2026-05-21 — dark-pool and options are live. They enrich the score and ranking but never change the launch decision (Joe's 2026-05-21 calibration call); the launch gate is insider + trend only.

universe._note: Retail re-scope 2026-05-20: lowered from a $10M average to a $1.5M median daily-dollar-volume floor for $10k-$30k positions. universe.py mirrors these values.

insider.rule_a_def: C-suite (CEO/CFO) open-market buy lifting personal stake >=10% and worth >=$100k
insider.rule_b_def: combined eligible insider buys in window >=0.05% of market cap

age_decay.curve: linear taper from full weight at day 15 to zero at day 31
age_decay.applies_to: insider layer points only (trend layer is not age-decayed)
age_decay.rationale: an insider buy keeps full weight while it is fresh, then fades out of the actionable list as it ages — tested to lift the launched-list win rate ~3 pts with no downside to fresh signals.

dark_pool._note: Activated 2026-05-21. Point values are from locked spec Section 6; engine thresholds are Senior-Quant design. NOT backtested — there is not yet enough dark-pool history. Owner-approved to ship with an on-page 'not yet backtested' disclaimer; Senior Quant sanity-checked the candidate values against the spec. Authoritative values live in darkpool_scoring.py.

options._note: Activated 2026-05-21. Point values and tier multiples are from locked spec Section 7. The 'moderately out-of-the-money' filter was the spec's CANDIDATE delta 0.35-0.50; switched to a strike-vs-price moneyness band (1.00-1.15x) by Senior-Quant decision because the stored option delta is ~68% null in production. NOT backtested. Owner-approved to ship with an on-page disclaimer. Authoritative values live in options_scoring.py.

long._launch_threshold_note: Unchanged at 3 by Joe's 2026-05-21 calibration call. The launch gate is the insider + trend score only; dark-pool and options points are added on top and lift the displayed score toward the ceiling of 10, but never add or drop a name from the list.

short.insider_sell_rule: evaluated but NOT scored under Option 1 — see backtest report short-side section

risk_levels._comment: stop / target are dark-pool-anchored in the live spec; dark-pool history is not yet available to calibrate them. Carried at draft pending shadow-mode data.

calibration_provenance.benchmark: eligible-universe average (no S&P 500 series in prices_eod)
